news.title: School of Education faculty and staff participate in UW–Madison program on AI in higher education
news.summary_en: Several faculty and staff from the School of Education are part of a new campus program dedicated to exploring how to engage with and respond to the use of generative artificial intelligence (AI) in higher education.

news.title: SERP student-led paper wins Best Student Paper Award at AERA
news.summary_en: A paper led by a Summer Education Research Program (SERP) student and co-authored by a UW–Madison faculty member and three graduate students has received a Best Student Paper Award from the Learning Sciences Special Interest Group (SIG) at the American Educational Research Association’s (AERA) 2026 Annual Conference.

news.title: Three ICTR leaders inducted as Fellows of ACTS in inaugural cohort
news.summary_en: Three senior leaders from UW–Madison's Institute for Clinical and Translational Research (ICTR) were honored as Fellows at Translational Science 2026 by the Association for Clinical and Translational Science (ACTS).

news.title: Parents’ excessive internet use may be lnked to depression in their teenagers
news.summary_en: A team of University of Wisconsin–Madison researchers found that parents’ internet use can negatively impact their kids’ well-being, but there are ways to help navigate and reduce this.
